## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Paste relevant test output. -->

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (backend / host-agent as applicable)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] For security-sensitive areas (auth, policy, approvals, hostlink, connectors, vault), I read [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) and the [security checklist](../docs/security/security-checklist.md)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the conventional prefix style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `refactor:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal paths are included in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
